combined_text: Neymar (I) "SEE RANKNeymar (I)Actor | Producer Neymar was born on February 5, 1992 in Mogi das Cruzes, São Paulo, Brazil as Neymar da Silva Santos Júnior. He is an actor and producer, known for x Xx: Return of Xander Cage (2017), Above the Noise (2017) and Shakira Feat. Carlinhos Brown: La La La - Brazil 2014
